channel.title: Shell Script on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in Shell Script on Memo

item.title: Shell Script Cheat Sheet
item.description: Shell Script Cheat Sheet # Array # Test code: #!/bin/sh array=(0 1 2 3) echo $array echo ${array[0]} echo ${array[@]} Output: 0 0 0 1 2 if # Test code: #!/bin/sh val0=0 val1=1 # if [ $val0 = 0 ]; then echo val0 = 0 elif [ $val0 = 1 ]; then echo val0 = 1 else echo otherwise fi # AND if [ $val0 = 0 ] && [ $val1 !
